AdSentinel test fixture

Serve this directory locally (python3 -m http.server 8000 from test/fixtures/, then visit http://localhost:8000/test-page.html — the manual scan flow requires http:///https://, not file://). Click AdSentinel's icon, hit Scan this page, and compare the popup's flag list against the expected column below. Any mismatch means a rule or a selector changed — check lib/detector.js and lib/heuristics.js before assuming the fixture is wrong.

CaseExpected flags
1. Clean sponsored postnone — proves the ruleset doesn't over-flag
2. Fake urgency copyDark pattern
3. Gambling categoryAge-restricted category (gambling)
4. Known network, labelednone — known host + accessible text
5. Unknown network, unlabeledUnverified network + No accessible text
6. Native ad, no text at allNo accessible text

Total expected: 6 ads found, 4 flagged (cases 1 and 4 should be clean).

1. Clean sponsored post

Expected: no flags

Sponsored: new running shoes just launched — shop the collection.

2. Fake urgency copy

Expected: Dark pattern

Only 2 left! Act now before this deal disappears.

3. Gambling category

Expected: Age-restricted category (gambling)

Best online casino jackpot slots — play free today.

4. Known network, labeled

Expected: no flags (known host, has a title so it's not "no accessible text")

5. Unknown network, unlabeled

Expected: Unverified network + No accessible text

6. Native ad, no text at all

Expected: No accessible text
